parents.subject: LU-17077 tests: reset group quotas in test_dom

commit.subject: LU-5896 mdt: do not overwrite the actual buffer size
commit.message:
LU-5896 mdt: do not overwrite the actual buffer size

When the request buffer size is variable and may be larger than
the minimum required, do not overwrite the actual size by min size.

Fixes: 529ea457da30 ("LU-5896 mdt: allow clients with old mdc_swap_layouts")
Change-Id: I872f414b07f1f71acce437e8637da4838325cff6
Signed-off-by: George Z. Zhao <georgezhaojobs@gmail.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65341
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
